features.name: immediate assert with else clause
features.description: Code should include an immediate assert statement with a condition and else branch
features.snippet: assert (ADDR_SIZE >= 8) else $error("Must be 1024 KB minimum address size");

features.name: immediate assert with $error function
features.description: Code should include an immediate assert with $error function call in the else branch

features.name: compile-time check via generate if
features.description: Code should include a generate if block used as a compile-time assertion workaround
features.snippet: generate if (ADDR_SIZE >= 8) begin end else $error("Must be 1024 KB minimum address size"); endgenerate
